dominants.dominant_desc:
Tips and Tricks:

Level 2 Spike: Selena is deadliest at Level 2. Hit an arrow, then use the Abyssal Trap + Soul Eater + Garotte combo for an easy First Blood.

Hidden Arrows: Fire your arrows from behind walls or from within bushes to reduce the enemy's reaction time.

Roaming: After clearing the first wave, immediately roam to the gold lane to pressure the enemy Marksman.

equips.equip_desc:
This build focuses on cooldown reduction and burst damage, allowing Selena to use her skills more frequently and deal high damage in a short time.
Magic Boots and Enchanted Talisman provide cooldown reduction and mana sustain, letting her spam skills. Lightning Truncheon increases burst damage, especially when hitting multiple enemies. Divine Glaive helps penetrate enemy magic defense, making her effective against tanky heroes. Holy Crystal greatly boosts her overall magic power, while Blood Wings adds both high damage and extra survivability.
This build is ideal for maximizing Selena burst combo and maintaining pressure throughout the game.

hero.hero_overview:
Selena is an assassin/mage hybrid who excels at early-game dominance and map control. She uses two forms—Elven and Abyssal—to switch between long-range poking and close-range burst damage. In the early game, Selena is commonly played as a roamer or mid-laner, placing Abyssal Traps to provide vision and control key areas like jungle entrances and objectives.
Her gameplay revolves around landing her Abyssal Arrow to stun enemies from long distance, then quickly switching to Abyssal form to finish them off with a burst combo. Instead of traditional farming, Selena focuses on roaming, setting up ambushes, and helping teammates secure kills. She is best at picking off isolated targets and disrupting enemy rotations.
hero.hero_strength: Selena excels in early-game pressure with strong pick-off potential, long-range crowd control, and high burst damage. She also provides excellent map vision through traps and can quickly engage or escape using her mobility.
hero.hero_weakness:
Selena is highly skill-dependent, requiring precise aim to land her Abyssal Arrow. Missing her stun significantly reduces her impact in fights. She is also very squishy, making her vulnerable to crowd control and burst damage if caught.
In the late game, Selena becomes less effective, especially against tanky enemies who can survive her combo. She also lacks sustained damage and relies heavily on successful pick-offs. Poor timing, positioning, or map awareness can make her ineffective and a liability to the team.

hero.hero_overview: Selena is a high-skill cap Mage/Assassin in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, renowned for her exceptional early-game power, long-range stuns, and dominant map control. Known as the "Abyssal Witch," she acts as a versatile pick, often played as a roaming support, midlaner, or jungler to disrupt the enemy team's early game.
hero.hero_strength:
Unrivaled Early Game & Gank Potential: Selena hits a massive power spike at level 2, often dictating the pace of the match early on.

Longest Stun Duration: Her Abyssal Arrow can stun enemies for up to 3 seconds, depending on travel distance.

Vision & Map Control: Her Abyssal Traps provide vision and can be placed in bushes, helping to prevent ambushes and secure objectives like the Lord or Turtle.

High Burst Damage: Her combo (Abyssal Arrow + Abyssal Form) can instantly kill most squishy heroes.

S-Tier Roamer: Her ability to roam and create picks makes her an excellent, aggressive roamer in the current meta.
hero.hero_weakness:
High Difficulty (Skill Floor/Ceiling): Requires precise aiming of her slow-moving stun arrow and fast combo execution.

Falls Off in Late Game: She becomes less effective and more predictable as the game progresses and towers are destroyed.

Vulnerable to CC & High Mobility: Heroes with CC immunity or high mobility (e.g., Wanwan, Lancelot, Benedetta) can easily escape or counter her.

Poor Wave Clear/Defense: She struggles to clear minion waves and defend against pushes.

High Mana Usage: She relies heavily on mana, making early-game sustainability challenging.

data.title: selena tips and tricks, for roam

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Good alongside most assassins, especially with YSS giving her extra vision to land long stuns and secure kills between the two.

counters.counter_desc: Her shield bothers her a lot when executing abyssal arrows and Selena exposes herself a lot with her close to try to get a kill.
Kufra's 2nd ability (anti dash) and excessive mass CC can be a big problem for Selena, as he can respond quickly to an input from her.

dominants.dominant_desc: Stay at a distance, farm safely with your 1st ability, rotate safely trying to poke, it is not necessary to go to the extreme for kills, stay in constant rotation and clean your lane
Maintain vision with your 1st ability in the enemy bushes, always try to hunt the most static and least defended targets, having your 3 item cores already ensures good damage.

This is where you're the poking weapon, keeping enemies at bay with your first ability placed in key bushes, and with your second and first hitting the enemy. Look for enemy damage from the sides without exposing yourself.

emblems.emblem_desc: Early damage, mobility for super-fast rotations, and burn to increase burst damage. You're guaranteed not to be item-dependent and have good base damage.

hero.hero_overview: Selena, an Assassin/Mage. She focuses on burst damage and map vision. Her main strategy is to stun for long periods at long range, provide vision, and be very elusive.
hero.hero_strength: Selena is an Assassin/Mage who shines in the early game thanks to her burst damage for one-shotting and her ability to provide key vision with her traps and get long-range CC with her arrow.
hero.hero_weakness: Selena's main weakness is her high difficulty, becoming almost useless if her arrow misses. She is extremely fragile and her damage decays in the late game, forcing her to rely on a solid lead early on.

data.title: Selena Introduction | Immortal Mythic Rank

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Compatibility (Hero Synergies)
Selena works best with heroes who can benefit from her vision, capitalize on her stun, or protect her during her risky dive.

counters.counter_desc:
Counters
Selena is countered by heroes who can deny her stun, block her damage, or punish her for diving in.

dominants.dominant_desc:
The Abyssal Ambush: Mastering Selena on the Battle Stage
Selena excels at creating picks, controlling the map, and dictating the early-to-mid-game tempo. Her battle stage mastery is a blend of precision aiming and aggressive rotation.

Hero Tips & Tricks
Mastering the Abyssal Arrow (Skill 2, Elven Form)
The Bush Trick: Always shoot the arrow from inside a bush. This reduces the enemy's reaction time and visual warning, making the stun significantly harder to dodge.

The "Double Mark" Setup (Advanced Combo): Immediately after casting your Abyssal Arrow (S2), quickly cast your Abyssal Trap (S1) directly in the arrow's flight path. This ensures the enemy is hit with both the stun and a trap, instantly stacking two marks on them for maximum burst.

Prediction is Key: The best Selena players don't aim at the enemy's current position, but where they will be. Predict the target's movement (e.g., trying to retreat, moving to clear a minion wave, or pathing towards a bush).

Executing the Burst Combo
The standard, high-damage kill combo is a rapid, smooth execution:
1. Stun: Land a long-range Abyssal Arrow (S2, Elven Form).
2. Transform/Prep: Instantly use Primal Darkness (Ultimate, S3) to switch to Abyssal Form, and immediately use Soul Eater (S1, Abyssal Form) to prepare your empowered basic attack and shield.
3. Dash In: Use Garotte (S2, Abyssal Form) to dash to the stunned enemy.
4. Execute: Use the empowered Basic Attack, consuming the marks and dealing massive damage.
5. Dash Out/Reset: Use the reset on Garotte (S2, Abyssal Form) to either dash out to safety, or dash to another marked target to chain the kill.

Vision Control (Abyssal Traps)
Objective Warding: Use your traps to provide permanent vision on the enemy's jungle entrances, near the Lord pit, and the Turtle pit. This is your primary job as a Roamer.
 Gank Prevention: Place traps in the mid-lane bushes and near your Marksman's gold lane bush to warn them of incoming ganks.
Stack and Explode: You can stac

equips.equip_desc: You can make it unli pana

hero.hero_overview:
Role and Gameplay: Primarily played as a Roamer or sometimes a Jungler, her gameplay revolves around her ability to stun enemies from an extremely long range with her Abyssal Arrow (Skill 2, Elven Form). Landing this arrow can lead to an instant kill combo due to its long stun duration and her subsequent high burst damage in her melee Abyssal Form.

Key Mechanic: She can switch between a ranged Elven Form (focused on setting up traps and long-range stun) and a melee Abyssal Form (focused on closing the gap, dealing burst damage, and resetting her dash). This versatility makes her a devastating early-game ganker and a continuous threat throughout the match.

Lore: Originally a Dark Elf, Selena was sacrificed to the Shadow Abyss. However, a balance was struck between the power of the Abyss and the Moon God within her, transforming her into the Abyssal Witch—the chosen voice of the Abyss and one of its most terrifying warriors.
hero.hero_strength: Selena's hero strength is defined by her extreme early-game presence and devastating burst potential, heavily reliant on her core skill shot.
hero.hero_weakness:
Reliance on Skill Shot: If she misses her Abyssal Arrow, her kill potential drops dramatically, leaving her vulnerable for the cooldown.

Vulnerability to CC Immunity/Purify: Heroes or battle spells that can cleanse or negate her stun (like Purify) completely shut down her burst combo.

Squishy and Low Sustain: She is fragile and can be easily bursted down if she fails to secure the kill or is caught out of position.

Difficulty Against Tanks: Tanky heroes with high Magic Defense can often survive her full combo, leaving her stranded in the enemy backline.

data.recommend: Please be careful to use selena

spell.spell_desc:
How It's Used (Versatility)
Flicker is prized for its ability to instantly reposition a hero, making it invaluable for both offense and defense:
 Defensive (Escape): It is a "get out of jail free" card. It allows heroes to instantly cross thin walls or put a large distance between themselves and a chaser, which is crucial for squishy heroes.
Offensive (Initiation/Combo): Many Tank, Fighter, and Mage heroes use Flicker to surprise the enemy. It is often combined with an Ultimate ability to execute a high-impact, sudden initiation. For example:
 Tigreal: Flicker + Ultimate combo to catch the entire enemy team off guard.
 Selena: Flicker is sometimes used to instantly close the distance after a long-range stun, or to escape after executing her burst combo.
 Outplay/Dodging: It can be used to instantly dodge a critical skill shot or crowd control effect (like a Franco Hook or an Eudora Stun) at the last moment.

data.title: narutoml09bb

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Los héroes con buen Early combinan excelente con Selena, deben ser héroes que brinden CC y daño en early Game para potenciar al maximo a Selena, la movilidad de Mathilda es excelente para Selena

counters.counter_desc: Los grandes counters son héroes con mucha defensa y vida

dominants.dominant_desc: En el juego temprano debes proveer visión en la jungla enemiga y puntos clave del mapa para poder predecir las rotaciones de tu rival, Focus daño a cualquier objetivo que logres stunear

En el juego medio y juego Tardío debes focusear con daño a objetivos con poca defensa como el Jungla, Mago y Tirador enemigo, evitar focusear a Combatientes y Tanques, no olvides proveer visión en el mapa en puntos clave

emblems.emblem_desc: Tener gran movilidad permite a Selena rotar y proveer visión al equipo

equips.equip_desc: Está build te permite obtener daño en early Game y sustentabilidad en mid/late Game.

hero.hero_overview: Selena puede desenvolverse como Tanque debido a su gran movilidad, iniciación y capacidad de proveer visión al equipo, esto lo convierte en un héroe altamente versátil, con posibilidad de usarlo en Mid como en Roam.
hero.hero_strength: Selena destaca por su daño en el juego temprano, por su gran capacidad de cc y proveer visión, esto permite tener una visión constante del mapa y adaptar la estrategia del equipo en consecuencia.
hero.hero_weakness:
Selena puede verse debilitada ante héroes de estilo tanque/combatiente por su gran resistencia, debemos evitar Selena contra héroes como Hylos, Hilda, Gloo.

El daño de Selena en Late puede decaer, es necesario sacar el máximo provecho del personaje en el juego temprano y medio.

emblems.emblem_desc:
The mage emblem is used to focus more on a full mage build and utilize its magic power and magic penetration.
Inspire so that the cooldown of skill 2 and skill 1 can be more enjoyable to spam and also makes it easier for us to farm faster.
seasoned hunter to make it easier to take on jungle monsters alone.
quantum charge to make it easier to rotate and to increase escape skills against enemies.

equips.equip_desc: The key to this build lies in the sky piercer and is assisted by the damage genius wand, hoping to make it easier to damage and kill in order to collect the sky piercer at the start of the game.

emblems.emblem_desc:
In Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, Selena's core /midlane gameplay revolves around her high mobility and ability to quickly position herself for both damage and escapes. Movement speed is crucial for her to Utilize her skills effectively: Selena's skills, particularly her stun and trap, require precise positioning and timing, which is facilitated by increased movement speed. Navigate the map and roam: Her high mobility allows her to quickly transition between lanes and react to enemy movements, making her a potent roamer. 

Escape dangerous situations: Selena's ability to dash away with her second skill (after stun) and her ultimate provides her with escape potential, which is enhanced by increased movement speed.

equips.equip_desc: Cooldown reduction items are valuable for Selena in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang because they allow her to spam her skills more frequently, maximizing her damage output and control. Her skills, especially her second skill (Abyssal Arrow), have a short cooldown, making cooldown reduction even more effective at increasing her overall impact in team fights and solo engagements.

hero.hero_overview: Selena, a young Dark Elf, was sacrificed to the Shadow Abyss by fanatics in exchange for dark energy, and as Elves are the Abyss Devil's favorite sacrifices, Selena was offered up immediately by the demons.
hero.hero_strength: Selena's strength in Mobile Legends lies in her high burst damage, excellent mobility, and ability to harass enemies from a distance, particularly against squishy heroes with poor mobility. She excels as a roamer, synergizing well with mid trio heroes and providing map control and vision with her Abyssal Trap. Selena's ability to stun an enemy for up to three seconds is also a significant advantage
hero.hero_weakness: Selena in Mobile Legends is vulnerable to heroes with high mobility, tanks, and heroes who can resist or negate her crowd control (CC) abilities. Her signature ability, the Abyssal Arrow stun, can be dodged or purged, making her less effective against these types of heroes.

spell.spell_desc: "Flameshot" refers to a battle spell that fires a flaming shot in a designated direction, dealing magic damage that scales with distance and slowing the target. It also knocks back nearby enemies, making it useful for various purposes, including damage, crowd control, and even team protection.
